hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { uv run --script $env:USERPROFILE\dotfiles\scripts\claude_hook_check_mojibake.py; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 2) { exit 2 } else { exit 0 } }"
powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { uv run --script $env:USERPROFILE\dotfiles\scripts\claude_hook_check_ps1_eol.py; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 2) { exit 2 } else { exit 0 } }"
powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { try { uv run --script $env:USERPROFILE\dotfiles\scripts\claude_hook_call_formatter.py } catch {}; exit 0 }"
